question: The chart shows the product rating share for different categories. Based on the percentage labels, which statement is correct?

options.A: Quality has the highest rating share among all categories.
options.B: Design has the highest rating share among all categories.
options.C: Support has the lowest rating share among all categories.
options.D: Delivery has the lowest rating share among all categories.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
